title: Urostachys pittieri
taxonomy: Urostachys pittieri is classified as a species of mat-forming or cushion-forming fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Urostachys, which is a group of small to medium-sized ferns. Urostachys pittieri is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The species name "pittieri" refers to the plant's distribution in Panama, where it was first discovered. Urostachys pittieri is a relatively rare and understudied species within its genus.
